weapons.name: BROKEN STRAIGHT SWORD
weapons.description: A broken straight sword. Despite its poor condition, its light weight allows for fast swings.
weapons.lore: An old, chipped blade discarded by some forgotten warrior. Its edge is dull, but desperation sharpens the will.

weapons.name: BANDIT'S DAGGER
weapons.description: A wicked short blade used by thieves. Excels at finding gaps in armor and causing heavy bleeding.
weapons.lore: The preferred tool of the unseen. It doesn't need to hit hard if it hits the right spot.

weapons.name: UCHIGATANA
weapons.description: A curved single-edged blade from a distant land. Known for its sharpness and blood-drawing capabilities.
weapons.lore: A masterpiece of the East. It requires discipline and a calm mind to master its flow.

weapons.name: BROADSWORD
weapons.description: A standard straight sword used widely by warriors. Well-balanced in both speed and striking power.
weapons.lore: A reliable blade forged in Lothric. Many knights carried this sword to their graves.

weapons.name: CLAYMORE
weapons.description: A larger greatsword with a long reach. Capable of crushing armor and staggering even large foes.
weapons.lore: The 'bastard sword' modified for greater reach. It is a weapon of pure utility and power.

weapons.name: ZWEIHANDER
weapons.description: A massive slab of iron used with two hands. Its heavy swings can pancake enemies and break boss poise instantly.
weapons.lore: Legend says this blade was forged in a volcano. It is less a sword and more a force of nature.

weapons.name: DRAGON TOOTH
weapons.description: A legendary giant club crafted from the tooth of an ancient dragon. Slow, but grants massive defense.
weapons.lore: The legendary weapon of Havel the Rock. It provides high magic and fire resistance when held.

weapons.name: WINGED SPEAR
weapons.description: A long-reaching spear that allows for safe distance. Excels at piercing thrusts.
weapons.lore: The preferred weapon for maintaining distance. A single well-placed thrust can end a fight.

weapons.name: CAESTUS
weapons.description: Leather hand wraps with embedded metal. Allows for the fastest possible strikes but has zero range.
weapons.lore: When all else fails, a warrior relies on their own fists. These wraps just make them hit harder.
